allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k: d.get\(k\) for k in ['exports', 'types', 'main']}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/inventory -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"title":"Apple Watch Series 8 GPS 45mm Midnight","brand":"Apple","model":"Series 8","category":"Smartwatch","condition":"Good","purchasePrice":45.00,"notes":"Missing charger, band in great shape, minor scratches on bezel"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/listings -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"inventoryItemId":"cmpz0xbs80000pskp790snc4b","platform":"meta","listingTitle":"Apple Watch Series 8 45mm Midnight - Good Condition","listingDesc":"Great used Apple Watch Series 8.","listedPrice":149.99}')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('shopEnabled:', d.get\('shopEnabled'\), 'shopPrice:', d.get\('shopPrice'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; items=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i['id'], i['status'], i['shopEnabled'], i['shopPrice']\) for i in items]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(data[\\"data\\"]\)} items in feed'\); [print\(i['id'], i['title'], i['price']\) for i in data['data']]")
